hero.description: The Active Fact-Checking Engine that maps relationships across leaked documents, financial records, and public statements. FactWeaver doesn't just search - it reasons, connects, and actively 'lints' your stories for contradictions before publication.

features.title: The Complete Investigative Toolkit
features.subtitle: From document ingestion to contradiction detection, FactWeaver provides everything investigative teams need to uncover the truth.

graphRag.title: GraphRAG Intelligence
graphRag.description: Our knowledge graph understands relationships between people, organizations, financial transactions, and documents. Ask questions in natural language and discover hidden connections across millions of records.

visualization.title: The Holoboard
visualization.description: A 3D, WebGL-powered detective board that visualizes entity relationships. Use the timeline slider as a 'DVR for Corruption' - watch connections form over time.

ingestion.title: The LeakLoader
ingestion.description: Universal adapter for messy reality. Drag-and-drop PST emails, PDFs, bank statements, and web scrapes. Automatic entity extraction identifies people, organizations, and money trails.

governance.title: The Fact-Linter
governance.description: Active contradiction detection as you write. Our Chrome/Word extension highlights claims that conflict with your evidence base, complete with source citations.

personas.title: Sanctions Matcher
personas.description: Automatically cross-reference every ingested name against global sanctions lists (OFAC, EU, UN). Get instant alerts when persons of interest appear in your documents.

timeMachine.title: The Mole
timeMachine.description: Background monitoring that scans new documents as they arrive. Get alerts when new evidence connects to your existing investigation targets.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to uncovering the truth

ingest.title: 1. Ingest Everything
ingest.description: Upload leaked documents, emails, financial records, and public filings. FactWeaver automatically extracts entities, relationships, and builds your investigation knowledge graph.

analyze.title: 2. Explore Connections
analyze.description: Use the Holoboard to visualize money flows, corporate structures, and hidden relationships. Click two entities to find the shortest path of influence between them.

govern.title: 3. Verify Your Story
govern.description: The Fact-Linter actively checks your writing against the evidence. Get real-time alerts when your claims contradict the documented reality.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Investigative Teams
testimonials.subtitle: See how newsrooms are transforming their investigative capabilities

items.quote: FactWeaver helped us connect shell companies to politicians across 4 jurisdictions in days, not months. It's like having a superhuman researcher on the team.
items.author: Marina Kovacs

items.quote: The Fact-Linter caught three potential libel issues before we went to print. The source citations were bulletproof.
items.author: David Chen

items.quote: We processed the entire leak in 48 hours. Without FactWeaver, it would have taken our team six months to find those connections.
items.author: Dr. Sarah Williams
